channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 55 to 201 Brecknock Road, 20th April
item.description:
There have been dangerous and deep potholes along the stretch from 55 to 201 Brecknock Road for around 6 months. I will hold senior officials responsible should any deaths or serious injuries occur as a result of this poorly maintained stretch of road. I will record this communication as evidence until this stretch of road is properly resurfaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped 24 hours now, household refuse, 20th April
item.description:
Left in private parking bay for residents ( marked ) 1 day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bournewood Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked surface, sharp,, 20th April
item.description:
Cracked surface, it’s sharp and can damage tyres, it’s at the edge but hard to avoid as cars are always parked on the road, it’s a bit hard to capture on the camera

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amberley Court, North Cray, Greater London

item.title: Pavement stolen for utility connection, 20th April
item.description:
Utility connection jutting 3" into pavement, Hodford Road NW11 8NH. Street View shows it wasn't there in June 2022. People haven't needed to do this since utility connections began, and don't need to start now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Pavement stolen for utility connection, 20th April
item.description:
Utility connection jutting 3" into pavement, West Heath Avenue NW11 7QJ. In line with street tree on same side, adding to future narrowing. Street View shows it wasn't there in Sept. 2024. People haven't needed to do this since utility connections began, and don't need to start now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Avenue, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knatchbull Road, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: You closed the case, but it was not fixed at all, I took photos today at 4.30 pm, 20th April
item.description:
I reported this area next to Mountview and a bus stop C yesterday( Sunday) as in urgent need of through clean and found on app ' case closed' but as I passed there today it was not only not fixed but even worse. Please look at photos. Please make sure it is done before closing the case.Also, sweeping must be eccelarated in this area and more proper bins and anti letter signs installed, please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 120, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continued Issues with Neighbours Parking Intrusively, 20th April
item.description:
The newly moved in neighbours have consistently been parking multiple different cars in the council garden in front of their house by driving through everyone else’s front gardens ever since moving in. The location of the issue is the gardens along 1549 to 1555 Great Cambridge Road directly in front of local houses are the gardens mentioned. The neighbours of 1555 have also been threatening reports and complaints against the other residents as they come home at their front doors due to supposed parking issues despite their being available parking spaces further up the street or on the Main Street leading to the front of the houses. This has consistently been damaging the gardens of everyone else on the line. Up until this point the entire row of houses was in good terms and the parking arrangements worked for everyone including the previous residents of 1555 despite the previous owners having as many cars as the new owners.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Milk carton, 20th April
item.description:
Milk cartons on road all squashed between cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
